ddls:
CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "var_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "var_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable type */,
  "var_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "min_val" REAL /* Minimum value of the variable */,
  "max_val" REAL /* Maximum value of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label for the variable */,
  "units_id" INTEGER /* ID of the units of the variable */,
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* ID of the prefix for the variable */,
  "bg_color" TEXT /* Background color for visualization */,
  "col_color" TEXT /* Color for the variable in visualization */,
  "fg_color" TEXT /* Foreground color for visualization */,
  "lty" INTEGER /* Line type for visualization */,
  "lwd" INTEGER /* Line width for visualization */,
  "pch" INTEGER /* Point character for visualization */,
  "cex" REAL /* Character expansion for visualization */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category for the variable */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the variable was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the variable */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the variable is active */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Primary data source for the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_units_id FOREIGN KEY ("units_id") REFERENCES variable_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_prefix_id FOREIGN KEY ("prefix_id") REFERENCES variable_prefixes ("prefix_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES variable_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_var_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("var_type_id") REFERENCES variable_types ("var_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_types" (
  "var_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable type */,
  "var_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the variable type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the variable type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("var_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "var_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the value */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the variable */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the value was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the value is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_values_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variable_values_var_id FOREIGN KEY ("var_id") REFERENCES variables ("var_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the source is active */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata for the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "password" TEXT /* User's password (hashed) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "var_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the variable */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the variable was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the access log was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the log is active */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_var_id FOREIGN KEY ("var_id") REFERENCES variables ("var_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the category is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the unit is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variable_prefixes" (
  "prefix_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prefix */,
  "prefix_name" TEXT /* Name of the prefix */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the prefix */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the prefix was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the prefix is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prefix_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "vis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "var_id" INTEGER /* ID of the variable */,
  "vis_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., line graph, bar chart) */,
  "vis_config" TEXT /* Configuration settings for the visualization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the visualization is active */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_var_id FOREIGN KEY ("var_id") REFERENCES variables ("var_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value being entered */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the entry */,
  "entry_date" TEXT /* Date of the entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data entry is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES variable_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data review */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the review (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the reviewer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the data review was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date of the last update */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the data review is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_reviews_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES variable_values ("value_id")
)
